features.featureTitle: Build the main App shell with a three-section topbar: left panel (board selector dropdown + last-updated timestamp), center panel (title 'My Digital Board 2.0' + today's full date + live clock updating every second), and right panel (Lock / Unlock button). The topbar must be responsive and collapse to single-column on narrow screens.

Implement the Amazon Workplace Staffing Board with 5 columns (Process Guide, In Path Function, Problem Solve, LaborShare, Not Assigned), each containing subsections as defined: Process Guide → [Stow, Pick]; In Path Function → [Downstacker, Stower, Picker, Transporter (Stow or Pick)]; Problem Solve → [QXY2, XLX7, IOL/ICQA]; LaborShare → [Inbound, Outbound]; Not Assigned → [Default]. Drag-and-drop must allow cards to be moved between any subsection. Each card displays: person name, login, shift co-host code, and shift pattern.

Seed the staffing board with a default card for Miguel A Davalos (login: migudavc, shift co-host: DB3T0700, shift pattern: Back Half Days) placed in the Not Assigned / Default subsection. On state load, always ensure this card exists; if missing, prepend it. Migrate legacy column key names to the current subsection keys.

Implement the SNHU University Course Tracker board with 3 columns (Current Term, Upcoming Term, Not Assigned). Current Term and Upcoming Term each have two subsections: Pending and In Progress. Not Assigned is a flat drop zone. Seed 4 canonical course cards: ENG 190 (C-2 Term – March thru April 2026), IDS 105 (C-2 Term), ECO 202 (C-3 Term – May thru June 2026), PHL 260 (C-3 Term). Each card displays the course title and term. Cards are draggable between all drop zones.

Implement board lock/unlock functionality. When locked, all drag-and-drop is disabled, and attempting to move a card shows a toast notification 'Locked. Unlock to edit.' The Lock button becomes an Unlock button. Clicking Unlock opens a confirmation modal; confirming unlocks the board. Lock state must persist across page reloads.
Implement a transient toast notification component that displays short messages at the bottom-center of the screen for 1800ms then auto-dismisses.

Apply a dark deep-space visual theme consistently across the app: deep navy/near-black radial gradient background (#0b1020 base with #15204a highlight at top-left), frosted-glass panels with backdrop blur, subtle white-border cards, and muted white typography. Use this exact palette and style for all UI elements.
